topic: There was an empty house at the end of my street that the adults all whispered about
title: There Was an Empty House at the End of My Street That the Adults All Whispered About | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: There was a house at the end of my childhood street. Empty for forty years. Adults whispered about it.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior shot of a quiet suburban dead-end street at dusk, houses on both sides with porch lights on, the last house at the end of the cul-de-sac visibly darker and more overgrown than the others, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I grew up on Larch Avenue. Suburban Pittsburgh. Eighties.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a suburban tree-lined residential street in late summer afternoon, ranch-style houses with mowed lawns, no people, soft golden light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Twelve houses on the block. Twelve families. Everyone knew everyone.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small residential block from a slight aerial perspective at golden hour, houses clearly visible in a row, mailboxes at the curb, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The thirteenth house was at the end. We never counted it.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior shot of a single dilapidated two-story house at the end of a suburban street, the lawn completely overgrown, the windows boarded from inside, no mailbox at the curb, dusk light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Adults crossed the street to walk past it.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a quiet suburban sidewalk at evening, the sidewalk continuing past a dilapidated house but with a clear path of footprints crossing the street to the opposite side at that point, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: We were told never to go near it.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a faded NO TRESPASSING sign nailed to a wooden fence post in front of an overgrown front lawn, the sign tilted, late afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: When I was eleven, I dared myself to look in a window.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of the side of a dilapidated wooden house, a small ground-floor window with cracked glass, dim afternoon light, the surrounding overgrown grass tall, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Furniture inside. Dust covered. Set as if for breakfast.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a kitchen table seen through a dirty cracked window from outside, the table set with plates and silverware, dust covering everything, dim interior light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: And a single light on. Upstairs hallway. Forty years vacant.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior shot of a dilapidated two-story house at dusk, all windows dark except a single upstairs hallway light visible through a cracked windowpane, the rest of the house in deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I asked my father about it that night.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of two figures seen from behind sitting at a kitchen table at evening, only the back of a man's head and a child's smaller head visible, low ambient kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He told me the family who used to live there never moved out.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an old framed black and white family photograph on a fireplace mantel showing a 1950s family, the photo faded, slight dust on the frame, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I drove down Larch last Christmas. The light is still on upstairs.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior shot of the same dilapidated two-story house at twilight in a snowy yard, the upstairs hallway light still glowing through a small window, the rest of the house and street dark, vertical 9:16 framing
